violations.finding: Decimal step numbering in TRIAGE and RETRO protocol sections: 'Step 1.5: PM Role Boundary' (line 548), 'Step 1.7: Live-Evidence Mandate Check' (line 566), 'Step 1.9: User-Need Path Relevance Filter' (line 582), 'Step 4.5: Pipeline Block Assessment' (line 648), 'Step 5.5: QA Re-Run Assessment' (line 806), 'Step 5.7: False-PASS Audit' (line 818).

violations.finding: Contains Chinese trigger keywords: "又", "还是", "没修好", "第 N 次" listed as retry-detection strings in rule body.

violations.finding: Contains multiple Chinese phrases in rule text: "超出用户实际需求范围的修改提议 — 必须仅入 ledger", "超出用户实际需求范围", "扩张式措辞" embedded directly in rule body of out_of_scope_observations chapter.
violations.recommendation: Rule text must be English. Move verbatim Chinese phrases to docs/dev/ticket-*.md; replace with English paraphrases with task-id attribution.

violations.finding: Contains extensive Chinese text throughout the Tone/Mission section: section headings with Chinese (画像, 引导, 本职, 完美, 整洁), inline Chinese in explanatory text ("最完美优先", "在此基础上实现最小实现", "github人人都会称赞", full Chinese verbatim user directive at line 543, "三件 mission", etc.).
violations.recommendation: Verbatim user directives in Chinese must be moved to docs/dev/ticket-*.md. Section headings and inline explanatory text must be English-only. Use task-id attribution to reference the source ticket.

violations.finding: Contains Chinese trigger keyword: "以前没问题" embedded in regression detection rule text.
violations.recommendation: Translate to English: 'it used to work'; if verbatim CJK user-input matching is required, move to docs/dev/ticket-*.md with task-id attribution.

violations.finding: Chinese characters "以及", "并且", "以前" used as detection keywords in rule text.
violations.recommendation: Translate to English equivalents ('and', 'moreover', 'previously'); if needed for CJK detection, reference ticket with task-id attribution.

violations.finding: Chinese character "修复" embedded inline in Codex instruction text: "out-of-path 修复 dressed as in-scope".
violations.recommendation: Translate to English: "out-of-path fix dressed as in-scope".

violations.finding: Chinese text "用户需求实测满足" embedded inline in technical field description.
violations.recommendation: Translate to English: 'user requirement verified by live test'.

violations.finding: Chinese text "dev 偏离 BA spec AC 但用户需求实测满足 = PASS，但 dev report 必须显式记录 AC 偏离原因" embedded inline in rule text as spec reference.
violations.recommendation: Translate the rule text to English. If verbatim spec quote is needed, move to docs/dev/ticket-*.md with task-id attribution.

violations.finding: Chinese text "右侧有空白" embedded inline as example in verification rule — an English translation is already present next to it.
violations.recommendation: Remove the Chinese example; the English translation already provided is sufficient: '(right-side gap)'.

violations.finding: Contains Chinese Unicode range literal `[一-龟]` in detection bash code block used as an actual grep pattern (not a labeled example).
violations.recommendation: Label clearly as a detection example. The Chinese range characters are functional not illustrative and violate english-only for agent files.

violations.finding: Contains Chinese text "核心清理目标" embedded in an example JSON block under Standard 6 detection.
violations.recommendation: Replace with English placeholder: "Core Cleanup Targets".

violations.finding: Contains Chinese characters: 谢谢, 好的, 明白了, 完美, 清楚了, 就这样, 好了, 写吧 — listed as natural-conclusion detection signals but not wrapped in USER_VERBATIM tags and not in docs/dev/ticket-*.md.
violations.recommendation: Replace with: 'Non-English equivalents: equivalent gratitude, confirmation, satisfaction, or closure phrases in the user's language; do not enumerate non-English literals in this command file.' Move any verbatim preservation to docs/dev/ticket-*.md.

violations.finding: Contains Chinese characters: 应/不应 — appears in a rule prohibition (DO NOT use 应/不应 AC ladders) without USER_VERBATIM tag or docs/dev/ticket-*.md reference.
violations.recommendation: Replace with English equivalent: 'should/should-not' (i.e., 'parallel should/should-not AC ladders').

violations.finding: Contains Chinese text: 安全洞例外：即便在路径外也必修 — cited as 'Section 5.4 rule 2 verbatim' but not in docs/dev/ticket-*.md.
violations.recommendation: Remove the Chinese quote from the command file. Record the verbatim text in docs/dev/ticket-*.md and replace in close.md with English-only prose: 'security exceptions: fix even when outside the path-external scope.'

violations.finding: Contains Chinese text: 如果对用户体验和安全性以及整体代码仓库整洁程度不造成阻碍的，都不一定是NO的原因 and 用户需求 / 安全性 — cited as 'user's binding directive' without docs/dev/ticket-*.md reference.
violations.recommendation: Move the verbatim Chinese to docs/dev/ticket-*.md and reference by path. Replace in close.md with English-only paraphrase: 'pre-existing defects that do not obstruct user-need satisfaction, security, or cleanliness-of-THIS-diff are not NO triggers.'

violations.finding: Contains Chinese text: 将clean用的诸如style-inspector等加入close的steps中 — cited as 'Section 5.2 verbatim' without docs/dev/ticket-*.md reference.
violations.recommendation: Move verbatim Chinese to docs/dev/ticket-*.md and reference by path. Replace in close.md with English-only text: 'add /clean-style inspectors to /close steps.'

violations.finding: Contains Chinese text: 整洁度判定范围 = 仅本次 diff 新增的 violation = NO 阻断 close. 预存历史脏污一律不管 — cited as 'Section 5.4 rule 3 verbatim' without docs/dev/ticket-*.md reference.
violations.recommendation: Move verbatim Chinese to docs/dev/ticket-*.md and reference by path. Replace in close.md with English-only: 'cleanliness scope = only violations newly introduced in this diff; pre-existing historical violations are ignored entirely.'

violations.finding: Contains Chinese text: 历史脏污 — used as a technical term without USER_VERBATIM tag or docs/dev/ticket-*.md reference.
violations.recommendation: Replace 历史脏污 with English translation: 'historical technical debt' or 'pre-existing violations'.

violations.finding: Contains Chinese text: dev 偏离 BA spec AC 但用户需求实测满足 = PASS，但 dev report 必须显式记录 AC 偏离原因 — cited as 'Section 5.4 rule 4 verbatim' without docs/dev/ticket-*.md reference.
violations.recommendation: Move verbatim Chinese to docs/dev/ticket-*.md and reference by path. Replace in close.md with English-only: 'dev deviated from BA spec AC but user requirement verified as satisfied = PASS, provided dev report explicitly records the AC deviation reason.'

violations.finding: Contains Chinese text: 如果对用户体验和安全性以及整体代码仓库整洁程度不造成阻碍的，都不一定是NO的原因 — cited as 'Section 5.1 verbatim' without docs/dev/ticket-*.md reference.
violations.recommendation: Move verbatim Chinese to docs/dev/ticket-*.md and reference by path. Replace in close.md with English-only paraphrase already present in the same line.

violations.finding: Chinese text inline in BA dispatch prompt Goal field without USER_VERBATIM wrapping: "实现方式是最小最安全最完美最确定性地实现用户的需求，而不是扩大修复范围。一切以用户需求为中心。"
violations.recommendation: Translate to English: "The implementation approach is the minimal, safest, most complete, and most deterministic fulfillment of the user requirement — do not expand the fix scope. Everything centers on the user requirement."

violations.finding: Chinese retry-signal phrases appear without USER_VERBATIM wrapping: "又", "还是", "没修好", "第 N 次". These same phrases appear wrapped in USER_VERBATIM in dev.md:249 but are unwrapped here.
violations.recommendation: Either wrap in USER_VERBATIM tags matching dev.md:249 treatment, or replace with English equivalents: "again", "still", "not fixed", "Nth attempt".

violations.finding: Chinese text inline in BA dispatch prompt Goal field without USER_VERBATIM wrapping: "实现方式是最小最安全最完美最确定性地实现用户的需求，而不是扩大修复范围。一切以用户需求为中心。" (identical to dev.md:362).
violations.recommendation: Translate to English (same as recommendation for dev.md:362).

violations.finding: Clause C regex pattern contains Chinese tokens without USER_VERBATIM wrapping: 自动|手动中断|不要问|不要打扰.
violations.recommendation: Replace Chinese tokens with English equivalents in the regex: auto|manual-interrupt|do-not-ask|do-not-disturb.

violations.finding: Chinese phrase "用户需求中心" (user-requirement-centric) embedded in prose paragraph without any wrapper.
violations.recommendation: Translate to English: "user-requirement-centric" or "user requirement focus".

violations.finding: Rule 8 prose repeats Chinese autonomy-directive tokens without wrapping: 手动中断, 自动, 不要问, 不要打扰 appear in an explanatory sentence.
violations.recommendation: Replace with English equivalents: manual-interrupt, auto, do-not-ask, do-not-disturb.

violations.finding: Chinese parenthetical "自由探索" (free exploration) embedded inline: "specialists 自由探索 must NOT be reduced".
violations.recommendation: Translate to English: "specialists' free exploration must NOT be reduced".

violations.finding: Chinese retry-signal phrases in list without USER_VERBATIM wrapping: "又", "还是", "没修好".
violations.recommendation: Replace with English equivalents: "again", "still", "not fixed", or wrap in USER_VERBATIM if verbatim user-binding preservation is required.

violations.finding: Extremely verbose agent file: contains 4+ full Python function implementations (aggregate_results, analyze_failed_tests, error-handling loops, instruction-execution loops), a 50-line 'Example End-to-End Execution' narrative section, a 'Quality Checklist' section, a 'Best Practices' section with sub-sections, an 'Execution Modes' section with fenced implementation code, and a multi-section Troubleshooting guide. The majority of 680 lines is implementation detail that belongs in scripts, not agent instructions.
violations.recommendation: Reduce to: role description, input format (JSON schema), execution step summary (prose bullets, no code), output format (JSON schema). Extract all implementation code to dedicated scripts. Target: under 150 lines.

violations.finding: Verbose agent file: contains multiple Python function implementations (check_imports, has_argparse, has_json_output, has_exit_codes, validate_edge_case_coverage), a detailed 'Example Validation Execution' walk-through section, an extensive Troubleshooting section, and a 'Best Practices' section.
violations.recommendation: Reduce to: role description, input format (JSON schema), validation criteria summary (prose), output format (JSON schema). Extract all function implementations to dedicated scripts. Target: under 100 lines.

violations.finding: Three verbose mock-terminal scenario blocks (Scenario 1, 2, 3) spanning ~80 lines simulate complete terminal output with decorative emoji separators. The scenarios are highly repetitive. The Features section and Safety Features section duplicate the same 4 bullet categories. The Notes section repeats content from Features. The script invocation is duplicated at lines 29-31 and again at lines 162-169.
violations.recommendation: Remove the mock terminal output scenarios entirely or reduce to a single minimal example. Collapse the duplicated Features/Safety Features sections into one concise list. Remove the duplicate script invocation and redundant Notes/Related boilerplate. Target: ~30 lines total.

violations.finding: The command embeds large runtime context schemas (Steps 7, 10), expected JSON output schemas (Steps 8, 12), decision-tree pseudocode (Steps 9, 13), and a full subagent prompt template (Step 12, lines 393-421). These are runtime prototypes and documentation bloat loaded on every invocation.
violations.recommendation: Reduce to concise delegation instructions; move JSON schemas to script files or template references.

violations.finding: Steps 14-16 embed full verbatim sample output templates: a ~70-line markdown failure report template (Step 14), a 5-option interactive menu block with per-option prose descriptions (Step 15), and a 125-line completion report markdown template (Step 16). These are runtime output prototypes that waste context tokens on every agent invocation.
violations.recommendation: Remove embedded sample output templates. Replace with concise output requirements (1-3 lines each). Move completion report template to a separate template file generated by a script.

violations.finding: Trailing sections — Test Folder Initialization (with duplicate bash blocks), validator list (10 entries), Safety Features, Quality Standards, Helper Scripts Used, Integration with Other Commands, and Usage — duplicate information already present in the step-by-step workflow and add non-actionable descriptive prose.
violations.recommendation: Remove or consolidate into a 3-5 line reference block listing key scripts and their purposes.

violations.finding: Phase 6 embeds a full 37-line markdown runtime report template (section headers, placeholder fields, URL lists, issue tracking, recommendations, search path log). This is a runtime output format specification embedded as documentation bloat.
violations.recommendation: Replace with a concise reporting instruction: 'Synthesize findings into a structured report covering: search goal, key findings with URLs, issues encountered, and recommendations.'

violations.finding: Phase 6 embeds a full 45-line markdown runtime report template (executive summary, main findings with evidence/sources/confidence, detailed analysis, contrarian viewpoints, information gaps, sources used, research metadata, recommendations). This is a runtime output prototype loaded on every invocation.
violations.recommendation: Replace with a concise reporting instruction: 'Compile a report covering: executive summary, 5-7 key findings with evidence and sources, contrarian viewpoints, information gaps, and source list.'

violations.finding: The command file is a verbose integration guide: the 'Playwright is PRIMARY' statement is repeated three times (lines 29-30, 96-100, 127-128); three separate per-command usage examples; a Troubleshooting section with 3 issue/solution pairs; a Technical Details section; and a 'Ready to Use!' closing section with marketing language.
violations.recommendation: Reduce to: one-line purpose, one-line strategy, a single usage example, and one-line technical reference. Remove troubleshooting prose, repeated statements, and marketing closing.

violations.finding: Phase 6 embeds a 46-line markdown output template with placeholder bracket text for every field (Navigation Path levels, Result status, Final Content, All URLs Visited, Dead Ends Encountered, Alternative Paths Not Taken, Recommendations).
violations.recommendation: Replace Phase 6 template with a concise bullet list of required report fields: status (found/partial/not-found), final URL, final content summary, navigation path (URL + reason per level), visited URLs, dead ends, and next steps if not found.

violations.finding: File contains: (a) 5 repetitive 'Common Prototype Patterns' sections each following an identical When/Libraries/Features 3-bullet structure; (b) a 44-line JSX scaffold template with placeholder comments (Standard 8 pseudocode pattern); (c) 4 repetitive 'Example Prototypes' sections each with identical User:/Result: structure; (d) verbose emoji-heavy quality checklist; (e) marketing/non-functional closing line at line 218.
violations.recommendation: Replace the 5 prototype patterns with a concise 2-column table (Pattern | Key Libraries). Remove the JSX scaffold or reduce to a 5-line structural skeleton. Collapse the 4 example prototypes to a single representative example. Remove the marketing closing line. Target: under 60 lines.

violations.finding: References paths under test/ folder (test/scripts/validate-venv-usage.py, test/instructions/claude-md-protection.md, test/reports/execution-report-*.json) but the test/ directory does not exist on disk. The actual test infrastructure is in tests/ (plural). These are broken path references that would cause runtime failures.
violations.recommendation: Replace all test/ path references with tests/ throughout agents/test-executor.md.

violations.finding: References `stop-workflow-enforce.py` as the script that releases workflow-enforce, but this file does not exist anywhere in the repository (not in hooks/, not in scripts/).
violations.recommendation: Update the reference to the actual script that handles workflow-enforce release, or create the missing hooks/stop-workflow-enforce.py.

violations.finding: References `pretool-wrapper-userintent.py` as a PreToolUse hook that consumes the stop sentinel flag, but this file does not exist anywhere in the repository.
violations.recommendation: Update the reference to the actual hook that consumes the stop sentinel flag, or document the correct hook name.

violations.finding: References ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/bin/spec-verify.py but the file /dev/shm/dev-workspace/dot-claude/bin/spec-verify.py does not exist in the main repo tree.
violations.recommendation: Either add bin/spec-verify.py to the main repo, or update the reference to an existing path such as ~/.claude/scripts/spec-verify.py, or remove the coverage step if the script is not maintained.

violations.finding: References scripts/write-e2e-enforce.sh which does not exist in the scripts/ directory.
violations.recommendation: Either create the missing script with the expected interface, or update the reference to the actual replacement script name.

violations.finding: References scripts/write-e2e-enforce.sh which does not exist in the scripts/ directory (same missing file as dev.md:141-144).
violations.recommendation: Same fix as dev.md: create the missing script or update the reference to the actual replacement.

violations.finding: References scripts/write-e2e-enforce.sh which does not exist in the scripts/ directory (same missing file as dev.md and dev-command.md).
violations.recommendation: Same fix as dev.md: create the missing script or update all three references consistently to the actual replacement script.
